tasks.label: Company registration & bank account
tasks.labelZh: 公司注册及银行开户
tasks.notes: Must be done before permits, accounts, vendor orders, and billing can proceed.
tasks.notesZh: 必须在许可证、账户、供应商订单和账单处理之前完成。

tasks.label: PRF W-9 / COI / invoicing email
tasks.labelZh: PRF W-9 / 保险证明 / 发票邮箱
tasks.notes: Send Purdue Research Foundation setup documents. Switch billing from personal to company card.
tasks.notesZh: 向普渡研究基金会提交设置文件。将账单从个人卡切换到公司卡。

tasks.label: China furniture & materials order
tasks.labelZh: 国内家具及材料订购
tasks.notes: Tables, chairs, benches, interior/renovation materials. Must order by ~May 10 for mid-July arrival via ocean freight (~45 days).
tasks.notesZh: 桌椅、长凳、室内/装修材料。须在约5月10日前下单，海运约45天，预计7月中旬到达。

tasks.label: PRF equipment/renovation rectification plan
tasks.labelZh: PRF 设备/装修整改方案
tasks.notes: Submit to PRF/landlord. Strategy: frame as functional upgrade (equipment relocation, paint/wallpaper, new furniture) to avoid building permit if scope supports it.
tasks.notesZh: 提交给PRF/房东。策略：以功能升级（设备重新布局、油漆/墙纸、新家具）方式呈现，如范围支持则避免建筑许可。

tasks.label: Water / electric / internet / gas accounts
tasks.labelZh: 水电网气账户开设
tasks.notes: Set up or transfer all utility and operating accounts. Wintek fiber contract is confirmed; on-site walkthrough scheduled for Monday May 4, 2026, 12:30 PM - 1:30 PM. Must clear before NRA Show window (May 16-19).
tasks.notesZh: 设置或转移所有公用事业和运营账户。Wintek 光纤合同已确认；现场 walkthrough 安排在 2026年5月4日周一 12:30 PM - 1:30 PM。必须在NRA展会窗口（5月16-19日）前完成。

tasks.label: NRA Show (low-output window)
tasks.labelZh: NRA 展会（低产出窗口）
tasks.notes: Team attending NRA Show — treat as mostly unavailable for substantial project execution. Pull forward or push back any deadlines landing here.
tasks.notesZh: 团队参加NRA展会——基本不可用于重大项目执行。将此窗口内的截止日期提前或推后。

tasks.label: Interior paint / wallpaper / wall finish
tasks.labelZh: 内部油漆 / 墙纸 / 墙面装饰
tasks.notes: Starts after NRA Show if site readiness allows. Separate from health department package unless it affects construction.
tasks.notesZh: 如现场准备就绪，NRA展会后开始。除非影响施工，否则与卫生部门资料包分开处理。

tasks.label: Equipment selection / PRF spec direction
tasks.labelZh: 设备选型 / PRF规格方向
tasks.notes: Determine equipment selection and spec direction by May 15 for the PRF/landlord rectification plan. Includes: existing equipment to remain/remove/reposition, new/replacement equipment categories, major specs and models where available, utility and connection implications (plumbing, electrical, gas, ventilation). Dishwasher decision included.
tasks.notesZh: 5月15日前确定设备选型和规格方向，用于PRF/房东整改方案。包括：现有设备保留/移除/重新布置、新/替换设备类别、主要规格型号（如有）、水电气通风等连接影响。含洗碗机决定。

tasks.label: Equipment ordering
tasks.labelZh: 设备订购
tasks.notes: Convert PRF-approved equipment selection into final purchase orders by May 31. Confirm model numbers, lead times, delivery requirements, and vendor payment terms. Starts after NRA Show.
tasks.notesZh: 将PRF批准的设备选型转化为最终采购订单，5月31日前完成。确认型号、交期、配送要求和供应商付款条件。NRA展会后开始。

tasks.label: China freight / ocean shipping
tasks.labelZh: 国内海运发货
tasks.notes: ~45 days ocean freight. Ship by end of May to arrive mid-July. Includes customs and final delivery.
tasks.notesZh: 约45天海运。5月底发货，7月中旬到达。含清关和最终配送。

tasks.label: Full menu system draft
tasks.labelZh: 完整菜单体系初稿
tasks.notes: Draft the complete menu system by May 31: drinks menu, dessert menu, ice/shaved-ice/frozen items menu, front-kitchen menu, back-kitchen menu, and mini-market product list. This is an upstream dependency for the June 10 health-department package readiness gate.
tasks.notesZh: 5月31日前完成完整菜单体系初稿：饮品菜单、甜品菜单、冰品/刨冰/冷冻品菜单、前厨菜单、后厨菜单、便利店商品清单。这是6月10日卫生部门资料包就绪门槛的上游依赖。

tasks.label: Menu → health dept package finalization
tasks.labelZh: 菜单→卫生部门资料包定稿
tasks.notes: Convert the full menu system draft into health-department submission-ready format. Finalize item lists, prep methods, and equipment dependencies. Internal deadline June 10.
tasks.notesZh: 将完整菜单体系初稿转化为卫生部门提交格式。定稿菜品清单、制备方法和设备依赖。内部截止日期6月10日。

tasks.label: Equipment list / layout / warewashing / refrigeration
tasks.labelZh: 设备清单 / 布局 / 洗碗 / 冷藏
tasks.notes: Equipment list, kitchen/prep/storage/cooler layout, dishwasher/warewashing details, refrigeration/food-storage info. All needed for plan-review package. Internal deadline June 10.
tasks.notesZh: 设备清单、厨房/备餐/储藏/冷柜布局、洗碗/洗涤详情、冷藏/食品储存信息。均为计划审查资料包所需。内部截止日期6月10日。

tasks.label: Health dept plan-review submission
tasks.labelZh: 卫生部门计划审查提交
tasks.notes: Submit menu, equipment list, layout/flow, warewashing/refrigeration docs, required forms and fees. If this slips past late June, early-August inspection becomes unrealistic.
tasks.notesZh: 提交菜单、设备清单、布局/流程、洗涤/冷藏文件、所需表格和费用。如延迟到6月底之后，8月初检查将不现实。

tasks.label: Health dept review waiting period (~45 days)
tasks.labelZh: 卫生部门审查等待期（约45天）
tasks.notes: ~45 day review period. Track any questions or revision requests quickly. Keep a response owner assigned.
tasks.notesZh: 约45天审查期。快速跟踪任何问题或修改要求。保持指定响应负责人。

tasks.label: Trial cooking / service flow optimization
tasks.labelZh: 试菜 / 出餐流程优化
tasks.notes: During health-department review, start trial cooking/menu testing as soon as equipment and site readiness allow. Document and optimize prep flow, cooking/station flow, expo/packing, ordering/payment handoff, pickup/customer flow, bottlenecks, timing, portioning, staffing assumptions, and vendor sourcing based on tested items.
tasks.notesZh: 卫生部门审查等待期间，在设备和现场条件允许后尽快开始试菜/菜单测试。整理并优化备餐流程、烹饪/岗位流程、出餐/打包流程、点餐/支付衔接、取餐/顾客动线、瓶颈、出餐时间、份量、人员配置假设，并根据试菜结果优化供应商采购。

tasks.label: Buildout / equipment install / cleaning / testing
tasks.labelZh: 装修 / 设备安装 / 清洁 / 测试
tasks.notes: Continue in parallel with plan review. Includes cooler floor work, dishwasher install, cleaning, internet/camera/phone setup.
tasks.notesZh: 与计划审查并行进行。包括冷柜地面施工、洗碗机安装、清洁、网络/摄像头/电话设置。

tasks.label: Hiring / ServSafe / training / POS
tasks.labelZh: 招聘 / ServSafe / 培训 / POS
tasks.notes: Hire staff, complete ServSafe certification, train team, set up POS system.
tasks.notesZh: 招聘员工，完成ServSafe认证，培训团队，设置POS系统。

tasks.label: Health department inspection
tasks.labelZh: 卫生部门现场检查
tasks.notes: Target inspection window. Equipment must be installed and working. If fixes needed, address immediately and request re-check ASAP.
tasks.notesZh: 目标检查窗口。设备必须安装并正常运行。如需整改，立即处理并尽快申请复检。

tasks.label: Soft opening preparation
tasks.labelZh: 试营业准备
tasks.notes: Limited hours, controlled menu, invite/team/friends test. Run kitchen test, ordering/payment test, seating/queue/trash flow test.
tasks.notesZh: 限时营业、限定菜单、邀请/团队/朋友测试。进行厨房测试、点餐/支付测试、座位/排队/垃圾处理流程测试。

tasks.label: Public opening
tasks.labelZh: 正式开业
tasks.notes: Target: open before end of August 2026. Health clearance achieved, staff ready, operations stable, website/social updated.
tasks.notesZh: 目标：2026年8月底前开业。卫生许可已获得，员工就位，运营稳定，网站/社交媒体已更新。

milestones.label: PRF plan + equipment spec direction + accounts done
milestones.labelZh: PRF方案 + 设备规格方向 + 账户已完成

milestones.label: All equipment ordered + full menu draft done
milestones.labelZh: 全部设备已订购 + 完整菜单初稿完成

milestones.label: Health dept package internally ready
milestones.labelZh: 卫生部门资料包内部完成
